query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discovery_drafts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  intake_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500),
  content JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QmWxs7iH8DQva8.5d87819da4f6 --database J2wS2ZoP78AcJaejkgQxeA --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discovery_drafts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  intake_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500),
  content JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
